title: Seamless Azure DevOps & monday.com Sync – Your Projects, Always in Sync!
excerpt: We understand managing work items across Azure DevOps and monday.com can be a challenge, especially when updates need to be manually synced between the two platforms. The Azure DevOps Connector app eliminates that hassle…

posts.author: Megharaja (Megharaja Chandrappa)
posts.cookedHtml:
We understand managing work items across Azure DevOps and monday.com can be a challenge, especially when updates need to be manually synced between the two platforms. The Azure DevOps Connector app eliminates that hassle by enabling bi-directional synchronization, ensuring real-time updates without manual intervention!

Why This Integration Matters

Whether you’re handling Epics, Features, Tasks, Product Backlogs, or Bugs, keeping everything updated across both platforms is critical for seamless collaboration. With this connector, your team can:

  • Sync Work Items Automatically – No more manual updates!
  • Maintain Work Item Hierarchy & Relations – Keep dependencies intact.
  • Sync Comments & Status Changes – Stay informed across both platforms.
  • Integrate Custom Fields – Ensure all relevant data is captured.

Let’s Discuss!

We’d love to hear from you! Share your thoughts:

  • How do you currently manage work items across Azure DevOps and monday.com?
  • What features would improve your workflow?
  • Have you tried the Azure DevOps Connector? What’s your experience?

Comment below and join the conversation!
